'''yashadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberanalyst|cyberanalyst]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberanalyst|cyberanalyst]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yashadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæshædhæth|yæshædhæth]] || [[word:yæshædhæj|yæshædhæj]] || [[word:yæshædhæsh|yæshædhæsh]] || [[word:yæshædhæ|yæshædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yashashadhath|yashashadhath]] || [[word:yashashadhaj|yashashadhaj]] || [[word:yashashadhash|yashashadhash]] || [[word:yashashadha|yashashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yashadhath|yashadhath]] || [[word:yashadhaj|yashadhaj]] || [[word:yashadhash|yashadhash]] || [[word:yashadha|yashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yashafdhath|yashafdhath]] || [[word:yashafdhaj|yashafdhaj]] || [[word:yashafdhash|yashafdhash]] || [[word:yashafdhaf|yashafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yashadhatha|yashadhatha]] || [[word:yashadhaja|yashadhaja]] || [[word:yashadhasha|yashadhasha]] || [[word:yashadhaka|yashadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yashadhath|yashadhath]] || [[word:yashadhaj|yashadhaj]] || [[word:yashadhash|yashadhash]] || [[word:yashadha|yashadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yashadhathal|yashadhathal]] || [[word:yashadhajal|yashadhajal]] || [[word:yashadhashal|yashadhashal]] || [[word:yashadhakal|yashadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yashadhathatha|yashadhathatha]] || [[word:yashadhajaja|yashadhajaja]] || [[word:yashadhashasha|yashadhashasha]] || [[word:yashadhaka|yashadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yashadhathan|yashadhathan]] || [[word:yashadhajan|yashadhajan]] || [[word:yashadhashan|yashadhashan]] || [[word:yashadhakan|yashadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yashadhathaoro|yashadhathaoro]] || [[word:yashadhajaoro|yashadhajaoro]] || [[word:yashadhashaoro|yashadhashaoro]] || [[word:yashadhakaoro|yashadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
